title: HSB Weapons
description: Adds many Hypixel Skyblock weapons to your world!
body:
HSB Weapons is a datapack that adds many weapons from Hypixel Skyblock to your world!
Weapons are fully functional, with fully working abilities that resemble their Skyblock counterpart!

Features:
- 20+ Weapons,
- Custom Textures for each weapon (requires resource pack),
- Custom Abilities for every weapon,
- Mana system,
- Fully-Working Recipes for all items,
- 4+ Custom Materials,
- Early-Game, Mid-Game, and End-Game weapons,
- Immersive Descriptions
- Easy Setup

INSTALLATION GUIDE
1. Drag and drop the datapack into your world
1. Once in your world, do /reload to load everything into your game (Necessary only once)
1. And you are done! Enjoy HSB Weapons!
2. (For The Best Experience, also use the HSB Resource Pack to have all the textures!)

![Every weapon from HSB Weapons in a chest!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/28db3e80a29eaa1a7921d12322a354a3cc0049ed.png)

LEGAL -
This is not an official affiliation or endorsement of Mojang Studios, Hypixel, Hypixel inc, or any related companies, this is a fan-made datapack. Hypixel and its respective owners own all intellectual property associated with Hypixel SkyBlock, including but not limited to, weapons, items, and game mechanics. This datapack does not directly copy any copyrighted content, instead it makes use of elements that were inspired by Hypixel SkyBlock. This datapack is meant for personal use and was produced in accordance with fair use guidelines. The purpose of including content with a Hypixel SkyBlock theme in Minecraft is to entertain the community and is not intended to violate Hypixel's intellectual property rights. The inspiration for the features and weapons in this datapack goes to Hypixel who is properly credited for them.
For any questions, concerns, or legal inquiries regarding this datapack, please contact businessdrfuture@gmail.com
